summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Russian restaurant management system. All admin pages and client menu functionality working perfectly. Previous HelpCircle import issue resolved.
passed_tests: Admin Profile Page - stats widgets displaying correctly (5 views, 2 calls, 1 order, 3 employees)
Admin Profile Page - restaurant info card with proper Russian content
Admin Profile Page - menu promo card and quick action navigation
Admin Menu Page - categories list (8 categories: Закуски, Салаты, Горячее, Гриль, Паста, Десерты, Напитки, Кальяны)
Admin Menu Page - menu items CRUD functionality (add/edit/delete buttons)
Admin Menu Page - search functionality and dialog forms
Admin Orders Page - orders table with 1 order displayed
Admin Orders Page - staff calls tab with 2 call items
Admin Orders Page - status filters, search, and refresh functionality
Admin Settings Page - all 6 tabs working (Features, Restaurant info, Tables, Employees, Integrations, Appearance)
Admin Settings Page - 5 feature switches (online menu, staff calls, online orders, business lunch, promotions)
Admin Settings Page - restaurant form with 9 inputs
Admin Settings Page - tables management (10 table rows with CRUD)
Admin Settings Page - employees management (3 employees with CRUD)
Admin Settings Page - Telegram integration settings
Admin Settings Page - theme and color customization
Admin Help Center Page - FAQ search functionality
Admin Help Center Page - 4 quick links with article counts
Admin Help Center Page - 5 FAQ items with accordion functionality
Admin Support Page - contact form with subject selection, email, description
Admin Support Page - successful form submission
Admin Support Page - contact info cards and working hours
Client Menu Page (/menu/697DCAA5) - mobile-responsive design
Client Menu Page - restaurant branding and table identification
Client Menu Page - call staff functionality
Client Menu Page - 8 category tabs with switching
Client Menu Page - 3 menu items with proper Russian content and badges
Client Menu Page - add to cart functionality
Client Menu Page - cart dialog with quantity controls and order notes
Client Menu Page - successful order submission
Russian language interface working throughout application
Mint-brown color scheme implemented correctly
Responsive design working on desktop and mobile
